description: Page through Plaud recordings with optional filters.

after.description: Cursor from next_after of a previous response

folder.description: Folder ID (from `list_folders`); pass empty string for unfiled recordings

name: browse_recordings

description: Fetch full detail for one recording.

include.description: Large fields to include: transcript, speakers, summary

name: get_recording

description: Apply a reversible state change to a recording: rename, trash, restore, or move.

clear_folder.description: When true, removes the recording from its current folder (use instead of a magic folder_id value)

folder_id.description: Folder ID (from `list_folders`); required for move unless clear_folder is true

name: mutate_recording

description: Permanently and irreversibly delete a recording.

confirm.description: Must be true to proceed. Set this only after the human has explicitly confirmed they want to permanently delete the recording. Re-invoke with confirm=true after obtaining confirmation.

name: delete_recording

description: Rename a speaker label across all transcript segments for a recording.
name: rename_speaker

description: Fix transcript text by literal find-and-replace across all segments (e.g. correct a misheard word or name). Speaker labels are unaffected — use rename_speaker for those.

find.description: Exact text to find in the transcript (case-sensitive, literal — not a regex)

replace.description: Replacement text (may be empty to delete the matched text)

name: correct_transcript

description: Upload a local audio file to Plaud.

file_path.description: Absolute path to the audio file

folder_id.description: Folder ID (from `list_folders`) to assign after upload

start_time.description: Millisecond epoch integer or ISO 8601 string; defaults to now

timezone_offset.description: UTC offset in hours; defaults to local system offset

title.description: Recording title; defaults to file stem

name: upload_recording

description: List Plaud folders, returning id, name, color, and icon for each.
name: list_folders

description: Trigger transcription and summarization for a recording; the `wait` mode controls how long to block (default: transcript).

language.description: BCP-47 primary subtag (e.g. 'en', 'zh'); use 'auto' to detect

wait.description: How long to block after the transcribe/summarize request is accepted: 'none' returns immediately with {recording_id, accepted}, 'transcript' waits only for transcript readiness, and 'summary' waits for both transcript and summary.

name: process_recording

description: Merge two or more recordings into a single new recording, blocking until the merge job completes.
name: merge_recordings

description: Edit a recording's AI summary. operation='correct' does a literal find-and-replace (e.g. fix a misspelled name); operation='replace' overwrites the whole summary with new markdown. The recording must already have a generated summary.

content.description: Full replacement summary markdown. Required for operation=replace.

find.description: Exact text to find (case-sensitive, literal). Required for operation=correct.

replace.description: Replacement text (may be empty to delete). Required for operation=correct.

name: edit_summary

description: Manage Plaud folders: create a new folder, edit an existing one's name/color/icon, or delete one. To move a recording into a folder, use mutate_recording(mutation='move') instead.

confirm.description: Required true for action=delete. Set only after the human confirms; deleting a folder is irreversible (recordings inside are kept but unfiled).

folder_id.description: Folder ID (from `list_folders`); required for edit and delete

name.description: Folder name; required for create, optional for edit

name: mutate_folder
